description: Acme Cloud sells workflow automation software to mid-market and enterprise customers.

legal_regulatory_existential_risk.summary: Management disclosed privacy remediation milestones without any open enforcement action.

governance_investability.summary: Board oversight tightened with a new compliance committee, but the control environment is still maturing.

geopolitical_exposure.summary: The privacy program still has to satisfy EU and UK data-transfer rules, though the company has little direct conflict-zone exposure.

subsidies_taxes.summary: The remediation plan assumes only modest reliance on software R&D credits and no policy-driven demand subsidy.
